title: schizoloma pickeringii
intro: Schizoloma pickeringii, also known as the Pickering's schizoloma, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to have a positive effect on the body. The health benefits of Schizoloma pickeringii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Schizoloma pickeringii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
